CustomObject.description: Maps a Queue DeveloperName to the human-readable Routing_Reason__c text stamped on Case by CaseTriggerHandler. The Case mirror of Lead_Routing_Reason__mdt — decouples the audit-stamp text from the AssignmentRule criteria so they cannot silently drift. One row per Queue that Case.assignmentRules-meta.xml can route to. Built in;.
CustomObject.label: Case Routing Reason
